data.narrative:
Stark Defence is a Series A defense and security company founded by Florian Seibel, Uwe Horstmann, and Johannes Schaback, currently valued at $500M post-money following $100M+ in total capital raised. The valuation assessment draws from a peer set of 10 comparable companies—2 public and 8 private—operating in the same Defense & Security sector at Series A or Series B stages, including Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns.

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression modeling, anchored to the $500M last post-money valuation, applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical for advancement from Series A to the next financing stage, implying $1.0B. Peer-median analysis across the 9 comparable companies in the same sector and adjacent stages yields a median valuation of $1.0B, with observed peer valuations ranging from $60M to $1.5B. Both methods converge on identical point estimates.

The triangulated valuation range is $850M to $1.1B, with a median of $1.0B. This represents a 70% to 120% step-up from the current $500M valuation. Key uncertainties include capital intensity and path to profitability in the defense sector, the timing and terms of the next funding round, and revenue traction relative to the high-stage peers in the comp set, many of which are valued at or above $1.4B.
